name: Unsloth (2-5x Faster LLM Fine-Tuning)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0) for non-commercial; commercial license for production; Unsloth Pro is commercial

auth.notes: Local fine-tuning; HuggingFace Hub for model access

performance.notes: 2-5x faster training than stock HuggingFace; 70% less VRAM via custom CUDA kernels

agent_readiness.notes: Drop-in replacement for HuggingFace Trainer with 2-5x speedup via custom Triton/CUDA kernels. FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained() loads models with 4-bit quantization. LoRA/QLoRA via get_peft_model(). Models: Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3, Qwen. 70% less GPU memory. Works on T4/RTX 3090/A100. Colab-friendly. Compatible with HuggingFace Trainer, TRL SFTTrainer, DPOTrainer. Unsloth Pro adds 2x more speed. Non-commercial license for open-source models.

gotchas: License is not pure open source (commercial use restrictions)
Custom CUDA kernels mean limited GPU support (no AMD/Apple)
API can change with frequent updates
Production commercial license required for business use
best_when: Fine-tuning Llama 3/Mistral/Gemma on limited GPU hardware
Consumer GPU fine-tuning (RTX 3090, T4) where VRAM is bottleneck
Research and experimentation needing fast iteration
Colab/limited compute fine-tuning of large models
avoid_when: AMD GPU or Apple Silicon (NVIDIA only)
Very large scale distributed training (use DeepSpeed/FSDP)
summary: Unsloth makes LLM fine-tuning 2-5x faster with 70% less VRAM via custom Triton/CUDA kernels. Drop-in for HuggingFace Trainer with LoRA/QLoRA. Supports Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3, Qwen. Works on T4/RTX 3090/A100. Colab-friendly. Best for fine-tuning large models on consumer/limited GPU hardware. Check commercial licensing — non-commercial open source only for most use cases.
